# Read the uploaded file
path = "/mnt/data/file-45wY4rQofxWTSmbg4QAnpu-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-45wY4rQofxWTSmbg4QAnpu-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

def find_all(sub):
    # return list of start indices of occurrences of sub in text
    starts = []
    i = 0
    while True:
        i = text.find(sub, i)
        if i == -1:
            break
        starts.append(i)
        i += 1
    return starts

subs = [
"وَآتِ ذَا الْقُرْبَى حَقَّهُ وَالْمِسْكِينَ وَابْنَ السَّبِيلِ وَلا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيرًا * إِنَّ الْمُبَذِّرِينَ كَانُوا إِخْوَانَ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَكَانَ الشَّيْطَانُ لِرَبِّهِ كَفُوراً",
"يَا بَنِي آدَمَ خُذُوا زِينَتَكُمْ عِنْدَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا وَلا تُسْرِفُوا إِنَّهُ لا يُحِبُّ الْمُسْرِفِينَ",
"قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ اللَّهِ الَّتِي أَخْرَجَ لِعِبَادِهِ",
"كلوا واشربوا والبسوا وتصدقوا في غير إسراف ولا مخيلة",
"وَلَا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيرًا",
"وَآتِ ذَا الْقُرْبَى حَقَّهُ وَالْمِسْكِينِ وَابْنَ السَّبِيلِ وَلا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيراً * إِنَّ الْمُبَذِّرِينَ كَانُوا إِخْوَانَ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَكَانَ الشَّيْطَانُ لِرَبِّهِ كَفُوراً",
"يَا بَنِي آدَمَ خُذُوا زِينَتَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا وَلا تُسْرِفُوا إِنَّهُ لا يُحِبُّ الْمُسْرِفِينَ",
"قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ اللَّهِ الَّتِي أَخْرَجَ لِعِبَادِهِ",
]

for s in subs:
    starts = find_all(s)
    print(s, starts, [ (i, i+len(s)) for i in starts ])

import re

# find all occurrences of parentheses content after indicator patterns
patterns = [
    "قال الله تعالى: (",
    "وقال تعالى: (",
    "باب قول الله تعالى: (",
    "باب قول الله تعالى:(",
    "قول الله تعالى: (",
]
found_segments = []
for pat in patterns:
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = text.find(pat, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        # content starts at pos i + len(pat) up to next ')'
        content_start = i + len(pat)
        j = text.find(")", content_start)
        if j == -1:
            break
        seg = text[content_start:j]
        found_segments.append((content_start, j, seg, pat))
        start = j + 1

found_segments[:10], len(found_segments)

# find content between curly braces after "قال الله عز وجل: {"
curly_segments = []
start = 0
pat = "قال الله عز وجل: {"
while True:
    i = text.find(pat, start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    content_start = i + len(pat)
    # skip potential spaces
    while content_start < len(text) and text[content_start] == " ":
        content_start += 1
    j = text.find("}", content_start)
    if j == -1:
        break
    # Exclude trailing space before } if any
    content_end = j
    # trim any trailing spaces before the brace
    while content_end > content_start and text[content_end-1] == " ":
        content_end -= 1
    seg = text[content_start:content_end]
    curly_segments.append((content_start, content_end, seg))
    start = j + 1

curly_segments

segments = [
    (924, 1108, "Aya"),
    (1180, 1307, "Aya"),
    (1374, 1436, "Aya"),
    (1485, 1536, "Hadeeth"),
    (2380, 2406, "Aya"),
    (3357, 3541, "Aya"),
    (3572, 3699, "Aya"),
    (3765, 3827, "Aya"),
    (3874, 3925, "Hadeeth"),
]

def context(start, end):
    s = max(0, start-5)
    e = min(len(text), end+5)
    return (text[s:start], text[start:end], text[end:e])

for start,end,typ in segments:
    left = text[start-1] if start>0 else ""
    right = text[end] if end<len(text) else ""
    print(start, end, typ, repr(left), repr(right), context(start,end)[0], " [span] ", context(start,end)[1], " [after] ", context(start,end)[2])
